headline: Raymond James’ New Capital Raising Option So Far 'Oversubscribed'
summary: Raymond James said it has closed a dozen investments and has 100 advisors in talks about a capital raise as part of its year-old program.

raw.headline: Raymond James’ New Capital Raising Option So Far 'Oversubscribed'
raw.summary: Raymond James said it has closed a dozen investments and has 100 advisors in talks about a capital raise as part of its year-old program.

headline: Raymond James Announces Client 360 Platform, AI Advisor Academy
summary: Raymond James highlighted artificial intelligence spending and tools for advisors at its annual conference in Las Vegas.

raw.headline: Raymond James Announces Client 360 Platform, AI Advisor Academy
